title: retama raetam var. duriaei
intro: Retama raetam var. duriaei, also known as the Desert broom, is a shrub or small tree native to the Middle East and North Africa. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and has also been used to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The herbal preparations of Retama raetam var. duriaei include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
